Official Naming Guidelines

BGMI ID Guidelines

Everything you need to know about naming rules, allowed fonts, symbols, and content policies in BGMI.

Last updated: May 2026BGMI Version 3.xKrafton Policy

Sections

Basic Rules

6 rules

Maximum 14 characters including spaces and symbols.

Uppercase and lowercase English letters (A–Z, a–z).

Numbers 0–9 are fully supported.

A single space between words is permitted.

Two consecutive spaces are not allowed.

Spaces at the start or end of a name are not allowed.

Fancy Fonts

5 rules

Unicode stylised characters (𝕒𝕓𝕔, 𝓪𝓫𝓬, 𝐚𝐛𝐜) are supported.

Greek / Cyrillic letters used decoratively (α β γ) work in most cases.

Each fancy unicode character counts as 1 character towards the 14-char limit.

Some stylised characters may not render on older Android devices.

Combining characters that overlap or display as boxes will be rejected.

Symbols & Special Chars

6 rules

々, 〆, ๛, ×, 亗, ★, ⚡, ツ, ✿, Ø are officially supported.

Japanese/Chinese decorative CJK characters (帝, 神, 父) are allowed.

Bracket pairs like 『 』 are allowed and very popular.

Symbols count as characters — use them wisely within the 14-char limit.

Most standard emoji (😀🔥) will render as [?] for other players.

Control characters or invisible zero-width characters are blocked.

Content Policy

6 rules

Names containing hate speech, slurs, or discriminatory language are permanently banned.

Impersonating real players, streamers, or Krafton employees is prohibited.

Sexual, violent, or otherwise explicit content will result in an account ban.

Using competitor brand names (e.g. PUBG, COD) in your ID is not allowed.

Clan tags in brackets are encouraged and widely used by pro teams.

Krafton reserves the right to force-reset any name without prior notice.

Name Change Rules

5 rules

You can rename your ID using a Rename Card obtainable in the in-game shop.

Rename Cards are available during events, the store, and Battle Pass rewards.

Changing your name does NOT change your in-game UID.

Friends list entries update automatically, but old screenshots will show the old name.

Free renames are not available — always use a Rename Card.

Disclaimer

These guidelines are based on community experience and publicly observable BGMI behaviour. Krafton may change rules at any time without notice. This tool is not affiliated with Krafton Inc. Always verify in-game before committing to a name change.

© 2026 Stylist BGMI. Not affiliated with Krafton Inc.
